search_empty_text: Text is empty — nothing to search.
unsaved_changes_text:
The document has unsaved changes.
Save before continuing?
help_features:
• Create, open and save text files
• UTF-8 encoding support
• Syntax highlighting (Consolas)
• Customizable tabulation
help_hotkeys:
• Ctrl+N - New file
• Ctrl+O - Open file
• Ctrl+S - Save
• Ctrl+Shift+S - Save as
• Ctrl+Z - Undo
• Ctrl+Y - Redo
• Ctrl+X - Cut
• Ctrl+C - Copy
• Ctrl+V - Paste
• Ctrl+A - Select all
• Ctrl+F - Regular expression search
• F5 - Run analysis
• F1 - Help
help_analysis:
Lexical analysis (scanner) runs first, then syntax and semantic analysis for the Swift construct: repeat { … } while <condition>;.
• Parser tab — syntax errors.
• Semantics tab — semantic error table and AST: switch between Tree and JSON.
• Click a row in error tables to jump to the fragment.
• Search (Ctrl+F or toolbar button on the right): popup panel — query field and Find button, plain or regex mode (preset or custom pattern); results table and count; click a row to select the fragment.
help_i18n:
• Russian and English language support
• Automatic interface update when switching language
help_interface:
• Dual-panel interface (editor + output)
• Line numbers in the editor margin
• Output tabs: Lexer, Parser, Semantics, Search
• Adjustable panel sizes
• Toolbar with icons
• Tooltips for all buttons
• Modern style with hover effects
help_additional:
• Unsaved changes warning
• File status display in title
• Panel splitter drag support
help_technical:
• Written in Python using PyQt6
• Modular architecture
• Easily extensible functionality
• Cross-platform compatibility
analysis_ok: No syntax errors, construct is valid.
